research_brief.problem_statement: Users need a lightweight, frictionless way to manage daily tasks without requiring account creation, cloud dependencies, or learning complex interfaces.
research_brief.target_audience: Individual productivity users, students, and those seeking minimal task management tools; demographics typically ages 18-50 across all tech proficiency levels.

competitive_landscape.name: Todoist
weaknesses: Steep learning curve for casual users

core.name: Add/Edit/Delete Todos
core.description: Basic CRUD operations for task management

core.name: Local Storage Persistence
core.description: Data persists across browser sessions without backend

research_brief.technical_recommendations: Build as a lightweight SPA using vanilla JavaScript or a minimal framework (Vue/Svelte). Use browser's localStorage API for persistence. Consider PWA capabilities for offline use. Optional: add localStorage quota detection, export/import via JSON.
risks: Extremely saturated market with free alternatives
No differentiators from existing free solutions
Data loss if user clears browser storage/cache

validated_idea.idea: Simple todo list web app with local storage
